name: Sidequest
description:
YS
A real project for a real person, portfolio site, Discord bot, game, tool, anything. You build it.
WS
Coins to spend in a shop full of rewards. The more you build, the further you go.

name: Puzzle
description:
YS: A website or app with puzzles such as Sudoku, crosswords, other popular puzzle formats, or your own original idea.
WS: Real-life puzzles and brainteasers, plus server credits to host your websites, a Raspberry Pi for self-hosting, and even a 3D printer to make your own puzzles.

name: Joker
description: YS: Something Digital Related to Cards WS: Github Playing Cards

name: Kernel
description: Create your own developer tool using the build-your-own-x repo on GitHub for project ideas! and get rewards ranging from software subscriptions to hardware and other dev goodies

name: Glide
description: you ship: an app related to clicking/mice (game, cps test, whatever) we ship: a mouse based on the hours

name: Jumpscare
description:
YS: A horror game

WS: Stickers, patches, scary themed merch, Raspberry Pis, drawing tablets and even Framework 12.

name: Commit
description: In this YSWS, you commit and make PRs on community projects. Every completed PR can earn you points in the shop.

name: Jus'STUDY
description: YS: Build cool projects based on weekly challenges, including both hardware and software. WS: A grant to help you build your own PC.

name: Kit-Lab
description: build software, get hardware

name: Fanout
description: Build real-time or collaborative apps with Fanout guidance and win electronic gadgets.

name: Hackanomous
description: Build AI or ML related hardware or software; get funding or prizes!

name: HYPOTHESIS
description: Build a research project using code or hardware, get cool prizes like Raspberry Pis or Jetson Nanos!

name: fr
description:
YS: build a real-time or collaborative app
WS: server credits, domains, keyboards, hosting grants

name: onekey
description: make a program that only uses one key, get a one key macropad!

name: Automake
description: Automake is a YSWS where you learn how to build automations. Whether it be email responders or Slack bots, you can get rewarded for it. Ship your first automation and you will receive your very own SBC to host and run your workflow on.

name: Codechange
description: Hack Club World Wide Exchange Program!

name: Darkroom
description: A photography focused YSWS!

name: NeWays to Play!
description:
Do you miss when gaming hardware felt weird, playful, and full of personality?

Presenting...
NeWays to Play!

Back in the 90s and 2000s, consoles felt fresh: tiny handhelds, strange controllers, bold ideas, and hardware that actually changed how games felt. Now, too much gaming hardware just feels like another box that runs games.

NeWays to Play is a YSWS for building playful gaming hardware: mini consoles, tiny handhelds, weird controllers, keychain games, 2-player pocket systems, or anything else that creates a fun and original play experience.

Go solo or make a team of up to 3 people!

YS:
a playable custom gaming device, mini console, or controller with original code and a unique twist
(If it starts Doom, it's an extra point)
WS:
stickers, components, dev boards, buttons, displays, and other gear to help you build the next version of your project, plus some well-earned electronic goodies.

If this sounds fun, jump in. Let's make gaming hardware weird again.

#neways-to-play
RSVP
(https://forms.fillout.com/t/icpC3KzBDqus)

name: Beacon
description: Ship a project, guide others, and earn prizes!

name: hackAI
description:
Create AI-Powered Real-World Application using LLM APIs (this is madatory)
And get AI CREDITS for ai models

name: Tabbed
description:
YOU SHIP: A project that is usable only with a keyboard. NO TAB KEY. NO MOUSE.
WE SHIP: Keyboard grants and prebuilt keyboards.:
